productDisplayName: Peter England Unisex Black One Dayer Black Trolley Bag
description: Style Notepeter england presents a wide range of efficient, everyday travel gear combined with impressive style. This compact and trendy one dayer trolley from Peter England, specifically designed for all your exciting getaways, strikes the right balance between convenience and style. The purple inners, mesh compartment and a smaller compartments are anbsp; smart, neat and compact way to carry your laptop, files, clothes and all your essentials and on thenbsp; top of our wishlist!Product DetailsOne main zipped compartment, with a laptop compartment that has a velcro closureOne flap in the middle which has an organiser sleeve and a zipped mesh compartmentTwo holders with click clasps to hold clothes in placeTwo elasticated buttoned closures for the mesh compartmentOne zipped pocket on the front and a smaller compartment with concealed magnetic buttoned closuresOne zipped pocket at the back with a small insert pocket for enhanced spaceTwo legs and two wheels at the baseOne extendable trolley handle and one short padded handle for carrying easeBranding on the frontMaterial and CareSyntheticUse damp cloth to remove dust and dirtWarranty: 6 monthsSizeHeight: 46 cmWidth: 22 cmLength: 38 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
